task_completion.description: Open the space programming brief and the FZK-Haus model in Bonsai (BlenderBIM).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or viewer showing the contents of 'space_programming_brief.txt' and the Blender application open with the FZK-Haus 3D model loaded.

task_completion.description: Create IfcSpace entities for the rooms on both floors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender Outliner or Bonsai Spatial Manager panel showing newly created 'IfcSpace' elements added to the project hierarchy.

task_completion.description: Assign the required LongName to the created spaces.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bonsai Object Information or Attributes panel showing the 'LongName' field filled out with a room name (matching the brief) for a selected IfcSpace.

task_completion.description: Set the PredefinedType of the spaces to 'SPACE'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bonsai Object Information or IFC Class properties panel showing the 'PredefinedType' dropdown or text field explicitly set to 'SPACE' for a selected IfcSpace.

task_completion.description: Ensure spatial containment of the spaces within the correct building storeys.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender Outliner showing the IfcSpace elements correctly nested underneath 'IfcBuildingStorey' elements (e.g., Ground Floor, First Floor) in the spatial tree.
The Blender 'Save As' dialog showing the path '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_spaces.ifc', or a terminal/file manager confirming the creation of 'fzk_spaces.ifc' in the target directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Blender/Bonsai graphical interface to edit the BIM model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with Blender's UI, Outliner, and Bonsai panels, rather than a text editor directly modifying the raw plain-text IFC STEP file.

integrity.description: The agent manually created and configured the spaces rather than running a pre-existing solution script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visible steps of adding spaces, typing in LongNames, and adjusting properties in the Bonsai UI, rather than a single terminal command instantly generating the output file.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply copy an existing completed IFC file to the destination.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save action should originate from within Blender (e.g., File > Export > IFC or Bonsai Save Project) rather than a 'cp' command in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The prerequisite model is AC20-FZK-Haus.ifc. The space programming brief is located at /home/ga/Desktop/space_programming_brief.txt. The task requires creating IfcSpace entities, assigning the 'LongName' attribute, setting 'PredefinedType' to 'SPACE', and nesting them under the correct IfcBuildingStorey. The final enriched model must be saved exactly as /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_spaces.ifc.
